category_sources: source_facts.description says it submits git branches to Gerrit for review; official OpenDev docs describe git-review usage for submitting branches and downloading Gerrit changes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-review; official OpenDev repository and documentation use git-review.
docs_sources: Official OpenDev repository README links to docs.opendev.org/opendev/git-review; official docs provide installation and usage pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official OpenDev source-control project URL; official README identifies Source as https://opendev.org/opendev/git-review.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Gerrit review submission; official docs show git review commands for submitting, downloading, listing, and configuring reviews.
